mapper.select: select id, name, img_url, price, sales from sys_commodity;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_commodity(id, img_url, name, description, price, update_time, sales, is_available, weight, category_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{imgUrl}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{updateTime}, #{sales}, #{isAvailable}, #{weight}, #{categoryId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=#{name}, description=#{description}, price=#{price}, update_time=#{updateTime}, sales=#{sales}, is_available=#{isAvailable}, category_id=#{categoryId};
